avsynctest.description: Aligned audio/video test sources for sync testing

avsyncaudiotestsrc.author: NVIDIA Corporation
avsyncaudiotestsrc.description: Emits tone pips phase-locked to avsyncvideotestsrc for A/V sync testing

src.caps:
audio/x-raw:
           rate: [ 1, 2147483647 ]
       channels: [ 1, 2147483647 ]
         layout: interleaved
         format: { F32LE, S24BE, S16BE }

is-live.blurb: Whether to pace output against the pipeline clock

pip-freq.blurb: Tone frequency of the pip in Hz

pip-interval.blurb: Nanoseconds between pips (must match the video source)

samples-per-buffer.blurb: Number of samples per output buffer

avsyncvideotestsrc.author: NVIDIA Corporation
avsyncvideotestsrc.description: Emits a sweeping bar phase-locked to avsyncaudiotestsrc for A/V sync testing

framerate.blurb: Default output framerate when downstream leaves it open

height.blurb: Default output height when downstream leaves it open

is-live.blurb: Whether to pace output against the pipeline clock

pip-interval.blurb: Nanoseconds between bar-centre crossings (must match the audio source)

width.blurb: Default output width when downstream leaves it open

nmos.description: GStreamer NMOS plugin (nmossrc / nmossink) talking to nvnmosd over gRPC

nmosaudiochannelmap.author: NVIDIA Corporation
nmosaudiochannelmap.description: IS-08 channel mapping between NMOS audio streams, backed by nvnmosd

channelmapping-name.blurb: Caller-chosen name for this channel mapping. It must be unique within the Node. It is not an IS-08 Input or Output ID.

daemon-uri.blurb: Address of nvnmosd used to expose this element through NMOS. Only Unix socket URIs are supported. Default: `unix:/tmp/nvnmosd.sock`.

domain.blurb: DNS domain used to discover NMOS services. Use `local` for mDNS. Empty selects automatic discovery. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

host-name.blurb: Host name advertised by the NMOS Node. Empty autodetects it. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

http-port.blurb: Port for the Node's NMOS HTTP APIs. 0 allocates a port automatically. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

node-seed.blurb: Caller-chosen seed for the NMOS Node. Elements using the same seed with one daemon join the same Node. Use a globally unique seed for each Node. It determines stable NMOS resource IDs. It is required.

registration-url.blurb: Fixed IS-04 Registration API URL. Empty uses DNS-SD discovery. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

restrict-routable-inputs.blurb: Limit each Output's IS-08 `/caps/routable_inputs` to this element's Inputs. When false, routable Inputs are unrestricted. Default: false.

system-url.blurb: Fixed IS-09 System API URL. Used only when `registration-url` is also set. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

nmossink.author: NVIDIA Corporation
nmossink.description: NMOS Sender supporting MXL (`transport=mxl`) and RTP/UDP (`transport=udp`, `udp2`, or `nvdsudp`)

auto-activate.blurb: Activate the configured data path without waiting for an IS-05 controller. This property does not change the GStreamer pipeline state. Default: false.

caps.blurb: Unpacketized media caps used to configure and advertise this Sender. When `transport-file*` is also set, it must agree with these caps.

daemon-uri.blurb: Address of nvnmosd used to expose this element through NMOS. Only Unix socket URIs are supported. Default: `unix:/tmp/nvnmosd.sock`.

description.blurb: Description for this Sender shown to controllers as IS-04 `description`. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`.

destination-ip.blurb: Remote unicast address or multicast group for RTP/UDP transmission. Empty uses `transport-file*` or a controller-supplied value. Corresponds to IS-05 Sender `transport_params.destination_ip`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

destination-port.blurb: Remote destination port for RTP/UDP transmission. 0 uses `transport-file*`, otherwise 5004. Corresponds to IS-05 Sender `transport_params.destination_port`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

domain.blurb: DNS domain used to discover NMOS services. Use `local` for mDNS. Empty selects automatic discovery. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

format-bit-rate.blurb: Coded media bit rate in kilobits per second for JPEG XS. 0 is unset. When only one bit-rate property is set, the other is derived. Used only with RTP/UDP.

group-hint.blurb: NMOS group hint for the Sender, for example `Camera:Video`. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`.

host-name.blurb: Host name advertised by the NMOS Node. Empty autodetects it. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

http-port.blurb: Port for the Node's NMOS HTTP APIs. 0 allocates a port automatically. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

label.blurb: Label for this Sender shown to controllers as IS-04 `label`. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`.

mxl-domain-id.blurb: UUID advertised for the MXL Domain. Empty lets `domain_def.json` supply it. Without either value, the domain remains application-resolved. It must match `domain_def.json` when both are present. Used only with MXL.

mxl-domain-path.blurb: Local path to the MXL Domain used by the data plane. A `domain_def.json` in this directory can supply or verify `mxl-domain-id`. Used only with MXL.

mxl-flow-id.blurb: UUID of the MXL flow produced by this Sender. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`. Used only with MXL.

node-seed.blurb: Caller-chosen seed for the NMOS Node. Elements using the same seed with one daemon join the same Node. Use a globally unique seed for each Node. It determines stable NMOS resource IDs. It is required.

pay-properties.blurb: Additional properties for the RTP payloader, for example `properties,mtu=(uint)1220`. Applied the next time the Sender data plane is built. Used only with RTP/UDP.

registration-url.blurb: Fixed IS-04 Registration API URL. Empty uses DNS-SD discovery. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

sender-name.blurb: Caller-chosen name for this Sender. It must be unique among Senders on the Node. Together with `node-seed`, it determines stable NMOS resource IDs. It is required unless supplied by `transport-file*`.

source-ip.blurb: Local source address for RTP/UDP transmission. Empty selects it automatically. Corresponds to IS-05 Sender `transport_params.source_ip`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

source-port.blurb: Local source port for RTP/UDP transmission. 0 lets the operating system choose. Corresponds to IS-05 Sender `transport_params.source_port`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

system-url.blurb: Fixed IS-09 System API URL. Used only when `registration-url` is also set. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

transport.blurb: Data-plane implementation. `udp` uses gst-plugins-good RTP/UDP. `udp2` uses gst-plugins-rs RTP/UDP where available. `mxl` uses MXL shared memory. `nvdsudp` uses DeepStream/Rivermax ST 2110. Default: `udp`.

transport-bit-rate.blurb: Total RTP/UDP/IP bit rate in kilobits per second for JPEG XS. 0 is unset. When only one bit-rate property is set, the other is derived. Used only with RTP/UDP.

transport-caps.blurb: RTP-layer settings expressed as `application/x-rtp` caps. Used only with RTP/UDP.

transport-file.blurb: Configuring SDP text for RTP/UDP or MXL flow-definition JSON for MXL. Empty makes the element derive the configuration from the `caps` property or negotiated upstream caps, plus applicable RTP/UDP endpoint or MXL properties. Mutually exclusive with `transport-file-path`.

transport-file-path.blurb: Path to configuring SDP or MXL flow-definition JSON, read when the element starts. Mutually exclusive with `transport-file`.

transport-properties.blurb: Additional properties for the selected transport source or sink, for example `properties,buffer-size=26214400`. Applied the next time the data plane is built.

nmossrc.author: NVIDIA Corporation
nmossrc.description: NMOS Receiver supporting MXL (`transport=mxl`) and RTP/UDP (`transport=udp`, `udp2`, or `nvdsudp`)

auto-activate.blurb: Activate the configured data path without waiting for an IS-05 controller. This property does not change the GStreamer pipeline state. Default: false.

caps.blurb: Unpacketized media caps used to configure and constrain this Receiver. Required when neither `transport-file` nor `transport-file-path` is set. When `transport-file*` is also set, it must agree with these caps.

daemon-uri.blurb: Address of nvnmosd used to expose this element through NMOS. Only Unix socket URIs are supported. Default: `unix:/tmp/nvnmosd.sock`.

depay-properties.blurb: Additional properties for the RTP depayloader. Applied the next time the Receiver data plane is built. Used only with RTP/UDP.

description.blurb: Description for this Receiver shown to controllers as IS-04 `description`. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`.

destination-port.blurb: Local listen port for RTP/UDP reception. 0 uses `transport-file*`, otherwise 5004. Corresponds to IS-05 Receiver `transport_params.destination_port`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

domain.blurb: DNS domain used to discover NMOS services. Use `local` for mDNS. Empty selects automatic discovery. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

format-bit-rate.blurb: Coded media bit rate in kilobits per second for JPEG XS. 0 is unset. When only one bit-rate property is set, the other is derived. Used only with RTP/UDP.

group-hint.blurb: NMOS group hint for the Receiver, for example `Camera:Video`. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`.

host-name.blurb: Host name advertised by the NMOS Node. Empty autodetects it. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

http-port.blurb: Port for the Node's NMOS HTTP APIs. 0 allocates a port automatically. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

interface-ip.blurb: Local interface address for RTP/UDP reception and multicast joins. Empty selects it automatically. Corresponds to IS-05 Receiver `transport_params.interface_ip`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

label.blurb: Label for this Receiver shown to controllers as IS-04 `label`. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`.

multicast-ip.blurb: Multicast group to join for RTP/UDP reception. Empty selects unicast reception. Corresponds to IS-05 Receiver `transport_params.multicast_ip`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

mxl-domain-id.blurb: UUID advertised for the MXL Domain. Empty lets `domain_def.json` supply it. Without either value, the domain remains application-resolved. It must match `domain_def.json` when both are present. Used only with MXL.

mxl-domain-path.blurb: Local path to the MXL Domain used by the data plane. A `domain_def.json` in this directory can supply or verify `mxl-domain-id`. Used only with MXL.

mxl-flow-id.blurb: UUID of the MXL flow consumed by this Receiver. Set it with `auto-activate=true` for a fixed pipeline. When set, overrides the matching value from `transport-file*`. Used only with MXL.

node-seed.blurb: Caller-chosen seed for the NMOS Node. Elements using the same seed with one daemon join the same Node. Use a globally unique seed for each Node. It determines stable NMOS resource IDs. It is required.

receiver-caps-mode.blurb: How the Receiver advertises media constraints to NMOS controllers. `constrained` publishes constraints. `unconstrained` publishes none. `auto` preserves the choice from `transport-file*`. When neither `transport-file` nor `transport-file-path` is set, `auto` publishes constraints. Default: `auto`.

receiver-name.blurb: Caller-chosen name for this Receiver. It must be unique among Receivers on the Node. Together with `node-seed`, it determines a stable NMOS Receiver ID. It is required unless supplied by `transport-file*`.

registration-url.blurb: Fixed IS-04 Registration API URL. Empty uses DNS-SD discovery. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

source-ip.blurb: Optional remote source filter for RTP/UDP multicast. Empty accepts any source. Corresponds to IS-05 Receiver `transport_params.source_ip`. Used only with RTP/UDP.

system-url.blurb: Fixed IS-09 System API URL. Used only when `registration-url` is also set. Only the first element to create the Node controls this value.

transport.blurb: Data-plane implementation. `udp` uses gst-plugins-good RTP/UDP. `udp2` uses gst-plugins-rs RTP/UDP where available. `mxl` uses MXL shared memory. `nvdsudp` uses DeepStream/Rivermax ST 2110. Default: `udp`.

transport-bit-rate.blurb: Total RTP/UDP/IP bit rate in kilobits per second for JPEG XS. 0 is unset. When only one bit-rate property is set, the other is derived. Used only with RTP/UDP.

transport-caps.blurb: RTP-layer settings expressed as `application/x-rtp` caps. Used only with RTP/UDP.

transport-file.blurb: Configuring SDP text for RTP/UDP or MXL flow-definition JSON for MXL. Empty makes the element derive the configuration from the `caps` property and applicable RTP/UDP endpoint or MXL properties. Mutually exclusive with `transport-file-path`.

transport-file-path.blurb: Path to configuring SDP or MXL flow-definition JSON, read when the element starts. Mutually exclusive with `transport-file`.

transport-properties.blurb: Additional properties for the selected transport source or sink, for example `properties,buffer-size=26214400`. Applied the next time the data plane is built.
